creator: evmax@earthlink.net
text:
CMI8330 chip based integrated sound cards produce no output to the
speakers. That is because audio CD input is disabled after the card
initialization.

Fix: 

Get cmi8330init software package and install it.

Here's the URL: http://www.cslab.vt.edu/~jobaldwi/cmi8330init.tar.gz
How-To-Repeat: Get M7xx motherboard with integrated CMI8330 chip based sound card.
Configure kernel for sound support and try to play audio CD.
